# Automation roadmap

## Phase 1: Manual + AI assist

```text
manual tagging
AI hook generation
AI critique
manual metrics entry
Bayesian spreadsheet
```

## Phase 2: Semi-automated research system

```text
automatic transcript extraction
automatic feature tagging
automatic metric ingestion where available
posterior update scripts
batch dashboards
```

## Phase 3: Decision engine

```text
bandit allocation
forecast intervals
experiment orchestration
controlled exposure routing
model calibration reports
```

## Phase 4: Closed-loop creative lab

```text
AI proposes variants
human approves
system publishes/schedules
metrics ingest automatically
model updates
next batch generated
```

## Safety boundary

Never automate:

```text
claims involving medical/legal/financial risk
deceptive hooks
content that violates platform policies
unreviewed proof/data claims
```
